news.title: gazans living under hamas rule are beginning to break their silence, describing sexual abuse by mult
news.summary:
gazans living under hamas rule are beginning to break their silence, describing sexual abuse by multiple men, sexual blackmail for aid or money and abuse by people in positions of power.

human rights organisations in gaza say that up to 60,000 women are vulnerable, with reports also indicating a rise in child marriages and pregnancies. 

jusoor news filmed rare video testimonies inside the strip. the filming was done at great risk because speaking up in gaza carries severe risk. 

in one account told by a male gazan, whose identity has to remain anonymous for his safety, he described how he found a widow displaced in the war being molested inside a tent by 'a bunch of' hamas members and was warned to stay silent.

'we were contacted by the wife of a friend. she had asked a qassam brigades commander to help her, but he took advantage of her,' he said.

'his behaviour is disgraceful. we investigated the matter and found her in a tent in the gharabli area where a bunch of qassam members were taking advantage of her. 

'we informed the leadership but we were told we had to keep silent about it.'

the izz ad-din al-qassam brigades is the military arm of hamas.

another gazan man confirmed that a similar episode had happened with one of his female neighbours, who was blackmailed by 'one of hamas’s charity organisations… they wanted her to wh*** herself in 거래소 for a food parcel, or an aid voucher, or 100 shekels'.

source: jusoor news

kelp dao’s rsETH cross-chai
news.summary:
kelp dao rsETH bridge exploit drains ~$292m, aave freezes rsETH markets

kelp dao’s rsETH cross-chain bridge was exploited, with approximately 116,500 rsETH drained via layerzero-related contract calls, valued at about $292 million at current prices; the protocol paused core contracts, blocking further attempts, and is investigating with layerzero and unichain, while aave has frozen rsETH markets and is assessing potential bad debt.

news.title:
vitalik buterin: 암호화폐 prices are the "ultimate double-edged sword."  

on december 5, 2025, 이더리움 fou
news.summary:
vitalik buterin: 암호화폐 prices are the "ultimate double-edged sword."  

on december 5, 2025, 이더리움 founder vitalik buterin  @vitalikbuterin discussed the original spirit of the 암호화폐 space in a green pill podcast interview. he believes the industry has had three key directions from the beginning: censorship resistance, providing an alternative path for those excluded from traditional systems; 

the "number go up" side, which he describes as an ultimate double-edged sword that pays for a lot of things but risks compromising the space's core values; and institution design, ensuring these new systems can maintain themselves without eventually becoming the same as the old boss.

video

on april 8, kalshi research released a clip fro
news.summary:
kalshi: hedge payroll costs against 인플레이션 pressure 

on april 8, kalshi research released a clip from kalshi's founder's @luanalopeslara  recent interview regarding institutional adoption. kalshi has now launched its block trading function, which is only open to eligible contract participants (ecps), i.e., institutional users. 

 payroll hedging is an innovative tool for enterprises to lock in payroll costs via prediction market contracts. it can effectively hedge the risk of payroll overruns caused by rising 인플레이션, helping enterprises convert uncertain labor costs into controllable fixed expenditures.

news.title:
cz: what to do when you hit rock bottom  

binance founder cz @cz_binance  shared that the best way
news.summary:
cz: what to do when you hit rock bottom  

binance founder cz @cz_binance  shared that the best way to navigate life's lowest points is to simply keep walking. recalling the anxiety of his early days as a freelance consultant and the immense pressure during his 2024 court sentencing, he noted that situations usually improve after just a few days. 

however, if you realize you are heading in the wrong direction, you must pivot decisively. if you find yourself trapped in a situation, it is time to change your environment or break old habits like overspending.

news.title:
🇨🇳🇮🇩🇦🇺 an indonesian fisherman just accidentally exposed china's underwater spy network.

he pulled
news.summary:
🇨🇳🇮🇩🇦🇺 an indonesian fisherman just accidentally exposed china's underwater spy network.

he pulled a 3.7-meter torpedo-shaped acoustic sensor out of the lombok strait.

built by china's 710 research institute, the military arm of state shipbuilding giant csic.

not a fishing accident. a window into what china has been quietly building for years.

the lombok strait is the primary deep water corridor that aukus nuclear submarines will use to reach the south china sea. china planted listening infrastructure directly on that route.

acoustic sensors like this one track submarine signatures. 

they map patterns, speeds, depths. over time, they build a library of exactly what's passing through and when.

@aadilbrar




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇨🇳 china spent $1.5t building a global empire, and half its oil still sails through a war zone.

for 20 years, beijing deployed capital everywhere with a purpose:

* $1.558t invested worldwide
* u.s., australia, brazil for resources and stability
* middle east and africa for energy access
* europe for markets and infrastructure

a system designed to lock down supply chains at every point.

and yet, with hormuz on fire, roughly 50% of china's crude imports still run through that single choke point.

so why does the gap exist?

pipelines take decades to build. overland routes from russia and central asia cover some of the gap, but nowhere near enough. electrification and evs help long-term, but today's refiners still need crude, and crude still moves by sea.

that's the real exposure:

* hormuz instability hits chinese refiners directly
* shipping and insurance costs are already spiking
* strategic reserves buy time, roughly 120 days, not a SOLution

beijing is moving fast to close the gap: accelerating russian pipeline capacity, building out central asia routes, burning coal as backup, and pushing ev adoption harder than any country on earth.

but fast isn't fast enough when a war is happening right now.

china built global reach. the strait of hormuz still runs the show.









— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2045535828470857759#m

news.title: 속보: the 연준eral reserve reported an operating loss of -$18.7 billion in 2025, marking its 3rd consecu
news.summary:
속보: the 연준eral reserve reported an operating loss of -$18.7 billion in 2025, marking its 3rd consecutive annual loss.

this brings the total 3-year loss to -$210.3 billion after the -$77.6 billion recorded in 2024 and -$114.0 billion in 2023.

the losses are primarily driven by the 연준 paying out more in interest to banks and money market funds than it earns from its bond and mbs holdings.

since the losses began in september 2022, the 연준 has stopped remitting income to the treasury department, ending a streak that totaled +$1.36 trillion since 2008.

however, the 연준 cannot become inSOLvent because it quite lite랠리 creates its own money.

truly incredible.

news.title:
wealth inequality in the us has never been wider:

the real wealth of the top 0.001% of us household
news.summary:
wealth inequality in the us has never been wider:

the real wealth of the top 0.001% of us households has grown +3,500% since 1976.

at the same time, 인플레이션-adjusted wealth of the top 0.01% and 0.1% has 급등d +2,200% and +1,200%, respectively.

by comparison, the average household has seen just a +200% increase.

as a result, there are now ~430,000 households worth $30 million or more, with ~74,000 worth over $100 million.

meanwhile, ~72% of wealth for the top 0.1% is concentrated in corporate equities, mutual funds, and private businesses.

to put this into perspective, the bottom 50% of us households had more debt than assets for nearly 2 decades, with their average wealth turning positive after the 2020 pandemic, following stimulus checks and growing home values.

asset owners are the only winners.

news.title:
us semiconductor etfs are attracting massive inflows:

the semiconductor etfs, $smh, and $soxx, have
news.summary:
us semiconductor etfs are attracting massive inflows:

the semiconductor etfs, $smh, and $soxx, have posted a record +$4 billion in inflows so far in april.

this is already above the full month record inflow set in december 2025, at +$3 billion.

this also follows a record -$1.9 billion outflow posted in march.

investors have now been net buyers of us semiconductor etfs in 7 out of the last 8 months, the best streak since 2023.

by comparison, these funds saw 8 consecutive monthly inflows in 2020 and 2023.

investors are piling into semiconductor stocks at a record pace.

news.title:
us stocks are experiencing a historic 랠리:

the S&P 500 closed over +3% higher for its 3rd consecutiv
news.summary:
us stocks are experiencing a historic 랠리:

the S&P 500 closed over +3% higher for its 3rd consecutive week, matching the streak last seen in june 2020.

in the past, comparable runs were also recorded in september 1982 and september 1940.

the only two longer streaks were posted in the 1930s.

the S&P 500 has also finished positive in 12 of the last 13 trading sessions.

meanwhile, the magnificent 7 index has closed higher for 15 consecutive trading sessions, rising +19% over this time.

market momentum is reaching extreme levels.

news.title:
the us technology sector is approaching a massive debt maturity wall:

more than $330 billion in hig
news.summary:
the us technology sector is approaching a massive debt maturity wall:

more than $330 billion in high-yield, leveraged loan, and business development company-linked software and technology debt is set to mature through 2028.

~$142 billion matures in 2028 alone, nearly 3 times the 2026 amount.

of that, ~$65 billion is in high-yield corporate bonds, while ~$77 billion is in leveraged loans.

most of this debt was issued during the pandemic era of near-zero 금리s, and companies will now have to refinance at significantly higher costs.

many firms are expected to begin refinancing as early as the 2nd half of this year.

the tech sector is about to see significantly higher 금리s.

news.title:
after a chaotic morning in the strait of hormuz, both sides have gone completely quiet.

iran has cl
news.summary:
after a chaotic morning in the strait of hormuz, both sides have gone completely quiet.

iran has closed the strait of hormuz again and president 트럼프 said he won't be "blackmailed" by iran.

as of friday, markets were expecting the us and iran to meet for the second time on sunday.

as of right now, there is no meeting planned and the ceasefire ends in 3 days.

we continue to believe that both sides will ultimately work toward a deal, as this pre-deal turbulence has been observed many times in previous conflicts involving president 트럼프.

us 주식시장 futures open in 24 hours and both sides know this.

all signs point to a highly eventful sunday ahead.

news.title:
it's official:

we are now witnessing the largest energy supply disruption in modern history.

since
news.summary:
it's official:

we are now witnessing the largest energy supply disruption in modern history.

since the start of the iran war on february 28th, more than 500 million ​barrels of crude and condensate have been removed form the global market.

in other words, global supply has now lost ~$50 billion ​worth of crude oil production since the iran war began nearly 50 days ago.

this is the same amount of fuel it takes to run the world's international shipping industry for 4 months.

the world has never seen anything like this before.

news.title:
미국이 이란 연계 선박에 대한 승선·수색·나포 단속을 글로벌 해역으로 확대하려는 움직임입니다.

이란 선박뿐 아니라 제재 대상 선박, 다크 플릿,
그리고 이를 활용하는 일부 수요까
news.summary:
미국이 이란 연계 선박에 대한 승선·수색·나포 단속을 글로벌 해역으로 확대하려는 움직임입니다.

이란 선박뿐 아니라 제재 대상 선박, 다크 플릿,
그리고 이를 활용하는 일부 수요까지 단속 대상에 포함될 가능성이 있습니다.

이는 단순한 봉쇄를 넘어, 선박 자체를 기준으로 통제하는 단계로 해석됩니다.

규칙은 이미 만들어졌고,
이제는 실제로 집행이 시작되는 구간입니다.

개호로무즈 타임라인 (미국 동부시간 기준)  

<금요일 낮>  

이란 외무장관 아바스 아라그치는 금요일, 해협이 상업 교통에 대해 '완전히 열려 있다'고 밝힘.     

이어 트럼프 대통령은 트루스소셜에 “호르무즈 해협은 완전히 개방되어 있으며 영업 준비가 되어 있고 전면 통행이 가능하다”고 글 씀.  약 한 시간 뒤 “이란은 다시는 호르무즈 해협을 폐쇄하지 않기로 합의했다”고 덧붙임.     

라이언 쏭, 이러한 주장에 의문 및 경계감 제기.   
고노고, 다음 주엔 빤쓰 입어 시전.   
위성 사진 업체 케플러, 호르무즈 해협이 '아직도 사실상 폐쇄된 상태'라고 언급    

<금요일 밤, 미장 종료>  

이슬람혁명수비대(irgc)는 금요일 늦게 상업 선박은 해군의 허가가 있어야만 통과할 수 있다고 엄포.  irgc와 연계된 매체들은 이란 외무장관의 발표를 비웃음, 이는 이란 정권 내부에서 이 결정에 대해 분열이 있음을 보여줌.     

고노고, "입어" 트윗 발사  

<토요일 낮> 
이란 군 대변인은 토요일 해협이 “이전 상태로 돌아갔다”고 협박.  여전히 “군의 엄격한 관리와 통제 하에 있다”고 위협.  호르무즈를 통과하기 위해 줄을 서 있던 약 20척의 선박은 오만 방향으로 되돌아가고 감.   

선박 추적 컨설팅 업체 보스포러스 옵저버는 “irgc가 외무장관이 하는 일을 사실상 거부하고 있다.  이보다 더 분명할 수는 없다”고 언급.    

트럼프 대통령은 토요일 아침 백악관에서 기자들에게 “그들은 다시 해협을 닫으려고 했다, 수년간 해왔던 것처럼”이라며 “그들은 우리를 협박할 수 없다”고 발표.     

<토요일 오후>  
영국 해사 당국은 오만 인근에서 한 선박이 이란의 사격을 받았고, 또 다른 선박이 해협에서 발사체에 맞았다는 보고를 받았다고 발표.  미 정부 관계는 미군이 상업 선박에 대한 최소 세 건의 이란 공격을 파악 중이라고 말함.   

irgc는 미국이 이란 선박과 항구에 대한 해상 봉쇄를 해제할 때까지 선박 운항에 대한 제한을 유지할 것이라고 주장함.   

<토요일 밤, 현재> 
(루머) 트럼프, 백악관 긴급 상황실 회의 소집.  
밴스, 루비오, 헤그세스, 베센트, 와일스, 윗코프, 래트클리프, 케인 등등 국가안보 내각 총출동 한 것으로 전해짐.
